Description: Path to eval_results.json from evaluation step
Task type — determines default metric name and direction
Metric name for threshold comparison — 'auto' resolves per task_type (detection: AP, classification: accuracy/top1, llm_finetune: eval_loss)
Whether higher or lower metric is better — auto-resolves from task_type or metric name patterns (loss→minimize, accuracy→maximize)
Quality gate — metric must meet this to trigger deploy (detection: 0.50, classification: 0.85, LLM: 1.5)

Source: Workflow param or prior decide output

Description: Maximum retrain attempts before outputting decision=stop
JSON array of previous iteration records — this step appends the current iteration before outputting

Source: Workflow param or prior hp-adjust output
Description: Current iteration's hyperparameters — stored in history for tracking only (not modified by this step)
Minimum metric improvement between consecutive iterations — 0 disables early stopping
Enable train_loss vs eval_loss divergence check — primarily useful for LLM fine-tuning
Routing decision for Argo conditional branching
Current primary metric value (formatted to 6 decimal places)
Resolved primary metric name (e.g. AP or accuracy/top1 or eval_loss)
Updated history with current iteration appended
Whether overfitting was detected — passed to HP adjustment step for regularization overrides
Passthrough of current iteration for downstream steps
Incremented iteration counter for recursive retrain
